fields.title: Migrate skill-marker/ feature
fields.description:
Move skill-marker extension to tau/src/skill-marker/

## Source files
- extensions/skill-marker/src/index.ts
- extensions/skill-marker/src/autocomplete.ts

## Target
- extensions/tau/src/skill-marker/index.ts
- extensions/tau/src/skill-marker/autocomplete.ts

## Changes
- Export initSkillMarker(pi, state) function
- Export wrapAutocomplete() for TauEditor
- Export afterInput() for TauEditor
- Remove registerEditorPlugin calls (now direct)
- Store skill registry in shared state

## DoD
- $skill markers detected in prompts
- Skill content injected before agent_start
- Autocomplete works in TauEditor
fields.close_reason: Moved skill-marker into tau and exposed editor hooks (wrapAutocompleteProvider/afterInput)
